About Me

Designing with Purpose & Precision

I'm a 22-year-old UI UX Designer based in Bangalore with 1.5+ years of professional experience crafting user-centered digital experiences.

My work spans SaaS platforms, product design, websites, mobile applications, branding assets, dashboards, and end-to-end user experiences — always grounded in strategy and driven by aesthetics.

I believe great design is invisible. It guides, delights, and solves — without demanding attention for itself.

SaaS · Product
SaaS Product
● Current Project

A modern SaaS platform crafted to simplify enterprise operations through intuitive user experiences, streamlined workflows, and scalable product design solutions.

  • Designed end-to-end workflows for compliance and disclosure modules
  • Created 40+ wireframes and interactive prototypes in Figma
